main.description: A music track published to the AT Protocol network.

artist.description: The artist name (display name of the uploader).

audioUrl.description: URL to the audio file. Optional when audioBlob is present.

fileType.description: Audio file format extension (e.g., mp3, wav, flac).

album.description: Album name this track belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the track was uploaded.

supportGate.description: If set, this track requires viewer to be a supporter of the artist via atprotofans.

description.description: Track description (liner notes, show notes, etc.).

audioBlob.description: Audio file stored on the user's PDS. When present, this is the canonical source; audioUrl is the CDN fallback.

type.description: The type of support required to access this content.

featuredArtist.description: A featured artist on a track. Identified by DID — the canonical, immutable identifier. handle and displayName are legacy denormalized snapshots; readers should resolve fresh metadata from the DID rather than trusting these fields.

did.description: The DID of the featured artist. Canonical, stable identifier.

handle.description: DEPRECATED snapshot — mutable, may be stale. Resolve from `did` instead. Older records include this; new records may omit it.

displayName.description: DEPRECATED snapshot — mutable, may be stale. Resolve from `did` instead. Older records include this; new records may omit it.
